summary: Selfie and facial recognition integration testing completed. 15/16 tests passed (1 skipped). All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend components exist and are properly integrated.
critical_code_review_comments: SurferProfile model correctly includes session_selfie_url, wetsuit_color, rash_guard_color, and stance fields
AI identity matching endpoints properly fetch selfies from LiveSessionParticipant, DispatchRequest, and BookingParticipant tables
Profile update endpoint correctly handles wetsuit_color and rash_guard_color fields
BookingSelfieModal and SelfieCapture components are properly integrated in ScheduledTab.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Selfie and facial recognition integration fully tested. All endpoints working: /api/bookings/{booking_id}/participant-selfie (PATCH), /api/surfer-gallery/ai-analyze-photo (POST), /api/surfer-gallery/ai-batch-analyze (POST). Profile fields wetsuit_color, rash_guard_color, stance are properly saved and retrieved. Frontend components SelfieCapture.js and BookingSelfieModal.js are integrated in ScheduledTab.js.

features_tested.participant_selfie_endpoint: PASS - PATCH /api/bookings/{booking_id}/participant-selfie accepts participant_id and selfie_url
features_tested.profile_identification_fields: PASS - wetsuit_color, rash_guard_color, stance fields save and retrieve correctly
features_tested.ai_analyze_photo_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/surfer-gallery/ai-analyze-photo fetches selfies from multiple sources
features_tested.surfer_gallery_review_endpoints: PASS - proposed-matches, session-entitlements, ai-sessions all working
features_tested.frontend_components: PASS - SelfieCapture.js and BookingSelfieModal.js exist and are integrated

selfie_sources.BookingParticipant: IMPLEMENTED - selfie_url fetched as final fallback

frontend_integration.BookingSelfieModal.js: IMPLEMENTED - Modal for booking selfie capture
